entrance.speaker: Fed Natty
entrance.text: Alright mate, you must be the new lad. Heard you got sacked from that office. Best thing that ever happened to you, trust me.

mood_variants.extreme_bull: MATE! Best day to start! Markets are PUMPING and I need bodies on the floor selling NattyMax!
mood_variants.bull: Good timing, lad. Business is good. Real good.
mood_variants.bear: Listen... it's been a rough week. Markets are down. But that's when REAL men step up.
mood_variants.extreme_bear: ...look, it's been bad. Really bad. But I'm still here. Still NATURAL. That's what matters.

options.text: Cheers. So what's the deal with this gym then?
I saw your Scammagram. You said you could help me make money?
You don't look natural to me, mate.

gym_pitch.speaker: Fed Natty
gym_pitch.text: This isn't just a gym, bro. This is the Iron Temple. This is where sigma males are FORGED. I built this empire from NOTHING. Chicken, rice, and DISCIPLINE.

mood_variants.extreme_bear: This gym is... it's all I've got left. The crypto's tanked but these gains? These are REAL.

options.text: Impressive. How do I get started?
Right... so about the money-making bit?

money_pitch.speaker: Fed Natty
money_pitch.text: Crapto, lad. That's where the real money is. I'll set you up with an account. But first — you need to LOOK the part. Nobody trusts a broke-looking sigma. Hit the weights.

options.text: Fair enough. Let's get to work.
I don't need to look any particular way to trade crypto.

called_out.speaker: Fed Natty
called_out.text: ...What? Natural? Course I am. Hundred percent. It's chicken, rice, and— look, are you here to train or are you here to chat bollocks?

mood_variants.extreme_bear: Don't you DARE. Not today. Not with the markets like this. I am NATURAL and I am FINE.

options.text: [Back off] Sorry mate, let's just train.
[Push it] Your back acne says otherwise.

natty_angry.speaker: Fed Natty
natty_angry.text: Right. You've got some nerve, new lad. I like that. OR I hate it. Haven't decided yet. Either way — you're doing EXTRA sets today.

natty_insists.speaker: Fed Natty
natty_insists.text: See, THAT attitude is why you're unemployed, bro. The grindset isn't just about charts. It's a LIFESTYLE. Image is everything. The body is the brand.

options.text: [Double down] My brand is my brain, not my biceps.

tutorial_start.speaker: Fed Natty
tutorial_start.text: Right then. First rule of the Iron Temple: we TRAIN, we EAT CLEAN, and we make MONEY. In that order. Let me show you the basics.
